---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, option, or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
The use case or the gap you hit.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like — a new tool, a new option/env var, or a behaviour change. If it
is a new tool, note the Graph endpoint(s) it would call and whether it is Read or
Write.

**Scope check**

- [ ] Uses only official Meta Graph endpoints (no unofficial APIs / no scraping)
- [ ] Targets professional (Business/Creator) accounts
- [ ] Not Ads / Marketing API (out of scope — see the README non-goals)

**Auth path**
Which login path(s) it applies to: A (ig-login), B (fb-login), or both.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches, and why this one.

**Additional context**
Links to the relevant Graph API docs, examples, etc.
